posts.title: Beautiful & Real Sunshine
posts.excerpt: A first release post with the song video, a short note, and room for the lyrics that shaped it.
posts.content: This is the release format going forward: one entry per song, a short written note, and the video at the center of the post.
posts.lyrics: You can add full lyrics here whenever a song needs them.

posts.title: Second Window
posts.excerpt: A quieter draft kept in the dashboard until the post is ready to go live.
posts.content: Draft posts stay simple too. Add the video, write the release note, optionally paste lyrics, and publish when it feels finished.
